results.justification: SAM perturbs weights then minimizes; ALTERNATING perturb-minimize cycle is the same imposed alternation mechanism as VENIK; sign-flip is a specific perturbation.

results.matched_effect_cluster: SAM oscillation cycle principal Hessian direction
results.justification: SAM converges to a CYCLE OSCILLATING between minimum along principal Hessian direction — exact alternating oscillation cycle.
Two-batch alternation in SAM — adjacent alternation paradigm.
Sparse-layer SAM specifically for LLM fine-tune; same alternation framework.
GPAS scales down activations preserving gradients — not sign-flipped alternation but adjacent activation modulation.
Evolution strategies with sign-direction perturbations and two queries — close conceptually but stochastic not imposed.
